name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NEW ADS HIGHLIGHT KELLY LOEFFLER'S RESULTS FOR GEORGIANS AND PLAN TO AID MINORITY COMMUNITIES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 22, 2020 NEW ADS HIGHLIGHT KELLY LOEFFLER'S RESULTS FOR GEORGIANS AND PLAN TO AID MINORITY COMMUNITIES
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released a new ad series highlighting her work to help Georgians secure COVID-19 relief and her plan to increase investment in minority communities. The first ad, titled "[Nicole](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R---s4h0L4zg5ibd7rSgmecnLeU3FB6aaC2N_lbuCrs_J4CzD4RE6kMlgmnmgz4JA49JkkFbr-Pgezp5C0jVWMThOEim41S0hS7DboCjYgUqQFsvMqFtlWhUy4ABt8-R8fyD-cjD-NLHicnajJyhLjcfWhGXntS_rNosruniHsgHBExjWpBw-9hgX3l6lRStFWV49O-cEbA=&c=myW7RJAIcex89wOuyJtmBVo1ynbgmKW7LavZNEs4k3kUC1mfmKIO6g==&ch=dADgcVawNsCVre63CTtBPiG9gxRjSAw1Th85DN16cvEM_eWgsVaK_w==)," highlights Kelly's work to secure $14 billion in relief for Georgians -- while Raphael Warnock's political group took $482,000 in Paycheck Protection Program loans. The second ad, titled "[Gaganjot](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R---s4h0L4zg5ibd7rSgmecnLeU3FB6aaC2N_lbuCrs_J4CzD4RE6kMlgmnmgz4JMneOh29LYV-PqpwdwM50imRpx-fSdYys750Zjkc4-LZFw1uW43Cu5wnsEUbn5uEw_LdfUCd-XUpfZB8XeyAfcNPI0C4AR6ZB4BpUngL4csswtfWyfJ8MOJddmvbEZgckgmbUNN_HaO0=&c=myW7RJAIcex89wOuyJtmBVo1ynbgmKW7LavZNEs4k3kUC1mfmKIO6g==&ch=dADgcVawNsCVre63CTtBPiG9gxRjSAw1Th85DN16cvEM_eWgsVaK_w==)," highlights Kelly's efforts to help Georgia small businesses and her personal donations to help fight the pandemic. name: Rita Hart
subject: Election Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gxrLhKDbSj3RUqFfJi-5QV2eLWy3BrugqDPRiHvz06o=/vtbeaPva44t3Ps9tP1uviXk9zS58cLhg5z76lrg1Dxw=) Peter, I wanted to make sure you heard from me that today I filed a Notice of Contest under the Federal Contested Elections Act. That means that I am asking a bipartisan committee in Congress for a full and thorough review of this election and a full district recount. In this filing, we brought to light 22 legally-cast votes that were unlawfully excluded from the initial tally. Although we are certain that if all legal votes are counted, I will be the winner, what's important is that there are Iowans who did not have their votes counted in this election. Here are just a few examples of some of those 22 votes: A college student studying away from home received a faulty envelope. She went through great pains to ensure her vote would count, but when she sent it back to her County Auditor, it wasn't. Two Iowans living with a disability legally cast their ballots curbside and trusted election workers to make sure their votes were counted. And they weren't. Due to a counting error, nine Iowans in Marion County did not have their legally cast ballots counted on Election Day. This error meant that, under Iowa law, their ballots couldn't be counted as a part of the recount. If our voting system is meant to work for all of us, then we as Iowans cannot accept that legal votes were left out of the count. That is my mission - to count every vote, and to give every Iowan the voice they deserve and have been promised through our Democracy. Thank you for your support,
Rita | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/gxrLhKDbSj3RUqFfJi-5QV2eLWy3BrugqDPRiHvz06o=/DCUSwN6450tt9V7UgTdnmcPLUSIE01oaZwUsK2frgNI=).

****** ******

In this filing, we brought to light 22 legally-cast votes that were unlawfully excluded from the initial tally. Although we are certain that if all legal votes are counted, I will be the winner, what's important is that there are Iowans who did not have their votes counted in this election. Here are just a few examples of some of those 22 votes: A college student studying away from home received a faulty envelope. She went through great pains to ensure her vote would count, but when she sent it back to her County Auditor, it wasn't. Two Iowans living with a disability legally cast their ballots curbside and trusted election workers to make sure their votes were counted. And they weren't. Due to a counting error, nine Iowans in Marion County did not have their legally cast ballots counted on Election Day. This error meant that, under Iowa law, their ballots couldn't be counted as a part of the recount. If our voting system is meant to work for all of us, then we as Iowans cannot accept that legal votes were left out of the count. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The BIG Showdown
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **All the work we've done over the past nine months, or 284 days of the "emergency", comes down to January. Are you willing to let Governor Walz trash our Constitution for another month? Or are you ready to put the nail in the coffin of Walz' Emergency Powers for good?!** As you know, we were able to get six Democrats to vote YES on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers in December. And FIVE new Republicans take office on January 5th, including our champion Rep-Elect Erik Mortensen.
## All we NEED is FOUR Democrats to vote with us!!!
That's right. If we can get four of the six Democrats who already voted the right way, to stay on our side, we can finally pass the Resolution in the Minnesota House and end this madness. Our team has already deployed volunteer phone callers around the state. Those six Democrats are hearing from small business owners and voters in their district as you are reading this message. The pressure is on! We can't take anything for granted at this point. The destruction of our economy and civil liberties is outrageous. Walz' Emergency Powers MUST End! We owe it to Larvita, Jane and the countless small businesses who opened up in defiance of the Governor already. We also owe it to our young adults who are experiencing alarming rates of depression and suicide. And the high school students who are being blocked from participating in sports. What Tyrant Walz is doing to them is unconscionable. Imagine the hundred thousand supporters of Action 4 Liberty went away. There would be nothing stopping Governor Walz' tyranny on the citizens of Minnesota. But because YOU joined the ever-growing list of supporters of Action 4 Liberty, we CAN stop him for good.
## **And then we'll make him pay for the damage he's done.**
I need your help to make sure we leave no stone unturned. Can you make a donation today to help us fully fund our Final Pressure Campaign? | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=3)
---
Insiders at the Capitol are telling us that these six Democrats are already starting to waiver. Was their previous vote just a facade?
We have the ability to hold these politicians' feet to the fire. Our program has proven results and we're right at the finish line. This can all be solved in January!
But we risk losing this battle if we don't have the resources needed to get past the finish line. It would be horrible to have to cut back our program now. Failure is just not an option.
With your support, we will put a full court press on these Democrat targets to make sure they STOP Walz' abusive and illegal powers.
**Equip us with the resources for the January showdown so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Please support our effort with a $100 donation. If that's too much, $50 or even $25 can be the difference between success and failure. Let's make this happen!**
## [Yes, I want to Help Fund the January Showdown](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=4)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**_P.S. All our work over the past 9 months comes down to the big January showdown. Once the new Legislature takes office, we need 4 of the 6 Democrats who already voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers to stay on board. But Capitol insiders have informed us that they are already starting to waiver. So we must put immense pressure on them to vote with us so we can put the final nail in the coffin of Walz' Emergency Powers._[Please support us with a $100 donation. If that's too much, $25 or $50](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=5) _can make all the difference._**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Mitch McConnell (iPhone)
subject: FINAL WEEKS: Your help is needed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Time is running out to SAVE our Republican Senate Majority and as of now Democrats have ALL of the momentum in these critical races. However, I'm not going to back down without a fight. We still have a few weeks left to turn the tide in Georgia, and I'm confident that if ANYONE can lead us to victory it's YOU. That being said, can I count on you to rush an emergency grassroots contribution to help us PULL AHEAD in the fight for the Senate in Georgia?

**URGENT: TIME IS RUNNING OUT TO WIN THE GEORGIA SENATE RUNOFFS**

This is bad, Friend.

Time is running out to SAVE our Republican Senate Majority and as of now Democrats have ALL of the momentum in these critical races.

However, I'm not going to back down without a fight. We still have a few weeks left to turn the tide in Georgia, _and I 'm confident that if ANYONE can lead us to victory it's YOU, Friend._

[**That being said, can I count on you to rush an emergency grassroots contribution to help us PULL AHEAD in the fight for the Senate in Georgia?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sduDH8Q0WWh7LZhNHaXMBsDJZ7yIl97kn02-nOiItEoXSRyI-khgUKQDiaYT_MEbRQMoLNp2w6C33iwmewsyT_5NFe5wuqIYLxRGRagpY2kb-fdEsSk8lNFgl8yNhTpfgsMlOjzrYK95RA0PEywgBdyLe2x2UJsBCZRRKZXgqzCUI3yPHrMEPYGXTAugh3vMZRUTK4jW4duIcwPsmh95mvnv-6WXq9_75UqHcFPKO-SeNy0Tu_-kqFq3ZGztbsTD75Z0FQ5UA03J1kjCpgEuxZ2b8ux1EN_U7nFOrpMmztNIO_bxchJ_SGelwVIR212BTGSHlgNEguzJCMr5MF28IX0J2HigQGgTiqLLHVq_QB6DS1lCxJkqxRzttrMQAOUMaokbsyu4RkiP1gQD3HYbQSlHO1NYP-f6QCNybGpkKFhpgz-8oR-AzwsfAdeJSnMb&c=9stbijTFcyIEks3gJp-Nlzytt5-qmS2NyZzsmCj7pMgT4kzuOxubXQ==&ch=7ZCf5LipoemxFKj3TRqUynpBV_KDHyCPyUyypWTIhQ4QgK0yGvTv1Q==)

[_**Any amount, no matter how big or small, will help us secure the resources we need to go toe to toe with Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and the rest of their radical cronies in the home stretch, Friend.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sduDH8Q0WWh7LZhNHaXMBsDJZ7yIl97kn02-nOiItEoXSRyI-khgUKQDiaYT_MEbRQMoLNp2w6C33iwmewsyT_5NFe5wuqIYLxRGRagpY2kb-fdEsSk8lNFgl8yNhTpfgsMlOjzrYK95RA0PEywgBdyLe2x2UJsBCZRRKZXgqzCUI3yPHrMEPYGXTAugh3vMZRUTK4jW4duIcwPsmh95mvnv-6WXq9_75UqHcFPKO-SeNy0Tu_-kqFq3ZGztbsTD75Z0FQ5UA03J1kjCpgEuxZ2b8ux1EN_U7nFOrpMmztNIO_bxchJ_SGelwVIR212BTGSHlgNEguzJCMr5MF28IX0J2HigQGgTiqLLHVq_QB6DS1lCxJkqxRzttrMQAOUMaokbsyu4RkiP1gQD3HYbQSlHO1NYP-f6QCNybGpkKFhpgz-8oR-AzwsfAdeJSnMb&c=9stbijTFcyIEks3gJp-Nlzytt5-qmS2NyZzsmCj7pMgT4kzuOxubXQ==&ch=7ZCf5LipoemxFKj3TRqUynpBV_KDHyCPyUyypWTIhQ4QgK0yGvTv1Q==)

I know this has been a long and hard year, Friend. We were MASSIVELY outraised and outspent in key Senate races across the country, yet we still came out victorious on November 3rd.

We still have a few weeks left to turn the tide in Georgia, and I'm confident that if ANYONE can lead us to victory it's YOU. That being said, can I count on you to rush an emergency grassroots contribution to help us PULL AHEAD in the fight for the Senate in Georgia? Time is running out to SAVE our Republican Senate Majority and as of now Democrats have ALL of the momentum in these critical races. However, I'm not going to back down without a fight. We still have a few weeks left to turn the tide in Georgia, and I 'm confident that if ANYONE can lead us to victory it's YOU, Friend. == == I know this has been a long and hard year, Friend. Michelle came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity. Instead, she found a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. She watched her single-mother fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill on her small-business simply because she lacked the resources to fight it. Since then Michelle has dedicated her life to hardworking Americans, fighting to keep more of your hard-earned money in your wallet.

That's why I have to ask: **[Can you chip in today to help defend this seat from the Far Left?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kw7dRl9sEkt1m3iCWK0x6gDjq_tIIJfpRFTntJjHvJ4c-3bm_veHUaOySHgp-1da6Ax7J2N-tZ6pH9pVaHDy4Ci1m6F-WpgeW7-9esTdd8LNPUiuz4Rl6H0YCgk3r_ypSfzkBzS0W6XBEw44PaaX0Uy-z6zGKaf3r4co7XqhlcMjbzZCBi2Vzh8dmZJn_A4Nwl-YVl2ePGOnoGQGq8kIOm1aAfvKD3aKHKZat7-MUN4MKOvj-3grx1PMB56hkMnicFDyTSQ8dJ4h1oBNUyWG8dCkDSF3S8yOMPr4OZjOxLUabSfakr-CdNKSqiuBrd26hY_lyrIDxUiZlm7TM-Fp-SNhs_E5Lkq9j_T18RDxug5Se9fjGIsn4u6_DTUb5B7MckR3JeyTk0zJTDzRc2uNykcQRBdFMthssMlniDIglZA=&c=518ahCZ8tC2vYiXvgFy6QSILgafh6S23QwNKUvk6nTfWfKyqPI43Fw==&ch=ulikyXjd7tBO4kNXde5NWt6sHWjyCIlU-IjBtDFjmMVhilMxSkI9hw==) What we do now goes a long way to building the infrastructure we need to spread our conservative message and WIN in 2022.**

Nancy Pelosi and the Far Left spent nearly $11 million attacking us, and now that they're desperate to win there's no telling how many millions more they'll spend. To make matters worse, our Far Left opponent -- _who declared a rematch in his concession speech_ \-- is already preparing his campaign war chest.

I know we can win, but we have to start fighting now. clean_body: We won by 8,376 votes 1 week after Election Day. %%First Name%%, I need you to understand just how critically close that is. We won by the smallest of margins in one of the most important races in the nation. If we're going to defend this seat from the Far Left, we have to start strong and start now. ** . == We won by 8,376 votes 1 week after Election Day. Friend, I need you to understand just how critically close that is. We won by the smallest of margins in one of the most important races in the nation. If we're going to defend this seat from the Far Left, we have to start strong and start now. == If we lose this seat we lose any chance of taking back the House for Republicans. | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == Michelle came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity. Instead, she found a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. She watched her single-mother fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill on her small-business simply because she lacked the resources to fight it. Since then Michelle has dedicated her life to hardworking Americans, fighting to keep more of your hard-earned money in your wallet. That's why I have to ask: == What we do now goes a long way to building the infrastructure we need to spread our conservative message and WIN in 2022.** Nancy Pelosi and the Far Left spent nearly $11 million attacking us, and now that they're desperate to win there's no telling how many millions more they'll spend. To make matters worse, our Far Left opponent -- who declared a rematch in his concession speech \-- is already preparing his campaign war chest. I know we can win, but we have to start fighting now. == Thank you, Steph Team Steel == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
It's clear we remain a top-target and this time won't be any easier. The dark money will multiply, the attacks won't stop, and Pelosi will spend whatever it takes to buy this seat because the House Majority is on the line.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sG-g7VI2JgqNTeBJZW24won-kXo4ihpwFoc78Y2-s9IJYgB4bufDr66YGxThKDwFzn_kOssdzBYnq7RPH5gNjZgY6j5UcZ2QwOikxlLimNNY6HMMcVbwvxP_OWAK4KYgNJaz8ZUQJget8LhtUiJINFtnSVRe_TIVTSH9E3JtwJOe3qmtcwZd-asQpSaatzYaxBF7XLO8K2Bl8oKwdpe3Zh-V3EIdQ0VAKBsI-6n5C_njM4Mdp_5bHTz0gVpPtUa2yqQNwvUCw8Av6cp9s6Tis9lNb3mc7y2PzKa98QBBcm76APKcb9hFL60qnFFSeQc18r5U2lCdgpJAGTk7Ct9BOfCG59hVTQdVHS1ya32l7RP7W02K2CmfCEwOKtknM8AfkgRTAL6S_GBNp7GIDPYCFK_xnniOzugQeoAmmIS5YGI=&c=XzOmTt90HP0VI73ka4QexhPy4KamsF-VnxGd6i4LltMEj_O4ihL2HA==&ch=vXe6foi8wEtWRxHT4qzyeRs7GT_E2JOv08zUZCnzow_yAnKNdcRmdA==)
---
Friend,

Despite the constant attacks and the $20+ million the Democrats spent to buy this seat out from under us, we won. _But we still have a target on our backs._

Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us in 2022 and she's got millions in dark money, mega-donor max-outs, and her campaign war chest to do it. body:
Friend,

I'm pouring over the numbers, and what I'm seeing has me worried. We're NOT on track to reach the critical End of Year goal.

**As of this morning, we need 61 MORE PATRIOTS from your area to step up today, or we will be in serious danger of falling short. **[**Will you rush a 6X MATCHED donation before midnight tonight, Friend?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011iyQX0aGH9t3IQ3B1gK-3oVdEJ4fSKMdAWsLdtvWYRvWmV-sdGansC40fVOfzgNYcXrqsSwIsZt4SK-NBIh9-l9KPbmowOdkGO8kAJRAsDgfiaaNdKjAwMlVk8YffK0ZHJs5yGg7PlapfmmzBnjywRJlEDGO--4wbUWjEMYKbq8P5wOaSaIHiIF9OcFomGpYCTsQK0iNTEPPRIWykebgqvnK03lvdTrxtqtMye0_VrLJmjVTmXe23UCpAMSAP9WOycVlZm8SqjhLdp-5j1bXR7py_dAJw0Dak87unDIpQbVp-NcFSoMOHUeaQPXSTsiaYgss0cofnvnY_k4_UrY49TpKGbwlZTMynmZjsX-PG3x-JWZX_hvwMNt3RKqtyPJHPAFdGY7PaJjjzuSQOn0HfLJ9tmdpUJlAWgwH40OFkfD080CaFcpdJ75SdgaS8T3zS5Zo8EEeAaE=&c=bY2cx8DVcmZgF0HIM9WpukTR0fUjsv4e4rvf4D-SqXWLJvsh4Uoeng==&ch=inJIVeQ82q0ajMbWjcpnY8FWLvNizPCBYIVkRhGtGFQx-hdwwJ7Rag==)

This is the biggest deadline we've EVER faced, and it could not have come at a more critical time:
* The Georgia runoffs election are just 14 days away
* Democrats have poured MILLIONS into flipping this battleground state
* Liberal megadonors and Hollywood elites are breaking the bank to help Democrats take full control of our country's agenda

**We need the resources to make our last stand in Georgia.****[Rush an emergency 6OO% matched donation before midnight so we can reach this last major goal!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011iyQX0aGH9t3IQ3B1gK-3oVdEJ4fSKMdAWsLdtvWYRvWmV-sdGansC40fVOfzgNYcXrqsSwIsZt4SK-NBIh9-l9KPbmowOdkGO8kAJRAsDgfiaaNdKjAwMlVk8YffK0ZHJs5yGg7PlapfmmzBnjywRJlEDGO--4wbUWjEMYKbq8P5wOaSaIHiIF9OcFomGpYCTsQK0iNTEPPRIWykebgqvnK03lvdTrxtqtMye0_VrLJmjVTmXe23UCpAMSAP9WOycVlZm8SqjhLdp-5j1bXR7py_dAJw0Dak87unDIpQbVp-NcFSoMOHUeaQPXSTsiaYgss0cofnvnY_k4_UrY49TpKGbwlZTMynmZjsX-PG3x-JWZX_hvwMNt3RKqtyPJHPAFdGY7PaJjjzuSQOn0HfLJ9tmdpUJlAWgwH40OFkfD080CaFcpdJ75SdgaS8T3zS5Zo8EEeAaE=&c=bY2cx8DVcmZgF0HIM9WpukTR0fUjsv4e4rvf4D-SqXWLJvsh4Uoeng==&ch=inJIVeQ82q0ajMbWjcpnY8FWLvNizPCBYIVkRhGtGFQx-hdwwJ7Rag==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011iyQX0aGH9t3IQ3B1gK-3oVdEJ4fSKMdAWsLdtvWYRvWmV-sdGansC40fVOfzgNYcXrqsSwIsZt4SK-NBIh9-l9KPbmowOdkGO8kAJRAsDgfiaaNdKjAwMlVk8YffK0ZHJs5yGg7PlapfmmzBnjywRJlEDGO--4wbUWjEMYKbq8P5wOaSaIHiIF9OcFomGpYCTsQK0iNTEPPRIWykebgqvnK03lvdTrxtqtMye0_VrLJmjVTmXe23UCpAMSAP9WOycVlZm8SqjhLdp-5j1bXR7py_dAJw0Dak87unDIpQbVp-NcFSoMOHUeaQPXSTsiaYgss0cofnvnY_k4_UrY49TpKGbwlZTMynmZjsX-PG3x-JWZX_hvwMNt3RKqtyPJHPAFdGY7PaJjjzuSQOn0HfLJ9tmdpUJlAWgwH40OFkfD080CaFcpdJ75SdgaS8T3zS5Zo8EEeAaE=&c=bY2cx8DVcmZgF0HIM9WpukTR0fUjsv4e4rvf4D-SqXWLJvsh4Uoeng==&ch=inJIVeQ82q0ajMbWjcpnY8FWLvNizPCBYIVkRhGtGFQx-hdwwJ7Rag==)**

Frankly, I'm worried with the direction in which we're headed. If we let Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi lead us into the future, we could reach a dangerous point of no return. _**Don 't sit this fight out - Democrats are ONE state away from total control.**_

This is the final critical fundraising deadline before election day in Georgia, and we need your support now more than ever before.

I'm counting on YOU to be one of the 61 Patriots from your area to join the frontlines of this fight. [**Rush a contribution of ANY amount right now to be 6X-MATCHED and help reach this goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011iyQX0aGH9t3IQ3B1gK-3oVdEJ4fSKMdAWsLdtvWYRvWmV-sdGansC40fVOfzgNYcXrqsSwIsZt4SK-NBIh9-l9KPbmowOdkGO8kAJRAsDgfiaaNdKjAwMlVk8YffK0ZHJs5yGg7PlapfmmzBnjywRJlEDGO--4wbUWjEMYKbq8P5wOaSaIHiIF9OcFomGpYCTsQK0iNTEPPRIWykebgqvnK03lvdTrxtqtMye0_VrLJmjVTmXe23UCpAMSAP9WOycVlZm8SqjhLdp-5j1bXR7py_dAJw0Dak87unDIpQbVp-NcFSoMOHUeaQPXSTsiaYgss0cofnvnY_k4_UrY49TpKGbwlZTMynmZjsX-PG3x-JWZX_hvwMNt3RKqtyPJHPAFdGY7PaJjjzuSQOn0HfLJ9tmdpUJlAWgwH40OFkfD080CaFcpdJ75SdgaS8T3zS5Zo8EEeAaE=&c=bY2cx8DVcmZgF0HIM9WpukTR0fUjsv4e4rvf4D-SqXWLJvsh4Uoeng==&ch=inJIVeQ82q0ajMbWjcpnY8FWLvNizPCBYIVkRhGtGFQx-hdwwJ7Rag==)

Thousands of small businesses have already closed their doors for good. Now thousands more are at risk -- destroying innumerable jobs, weakening our economy, and making it that much harder for Americans to make ends meet. It's time for America to open for businesses.
****

.

**Sign the "Stop the Shutdown" petition using your unique link -> [https://act.michellesteelca.com/stop-the-shutdown](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wRlUKYfFzAAprY1lWzMyckKbQUX11DODjBjklHqAub4cQxq8RAGmzO9C_TKgoWkZtUQ9gT6B3iEWZvVD7ui9Dp9LHUQJT5KAMBLl7aiD1QeO2Ry5fHH_TBuzwv3fjJQRJx3l4ZNQlVh7UFKnzNIs1vCgdwxsqmtyAeESECNjQgusqGvJUF53K9m5Im33zFn2ygFdabwqxv6073o0O2zSsAy3RLsAIXWq-wFkizUbT5t6OJQJNLXSs9_hjcTRvuDt4E9bX-m281XpCFdjoKd99G73ITtLiyL17YhrrZuk7JzGOfQNB1ihi8hUlgJhugIjoGR4NqiJAiQIEBIi16zopnTMi4HhTg5vV2vYx_pKbORDwgavxoMIgxWml3M4H_uFntddJQoLUNBte9oyUOyKXWiR9z-5hNPniO2318QCXEQ=&c=yrsj7MJGgQHxe5I-rorQ6dfQHuWk-QGZODDNiHgvBt0I17meuLtohw==&ch=d9nqpMX9HFBKDE0FTkizB8uksnKqoYlBJ7f8-T22sEyhcdpqXlYTdA==)**

Hi Friend, it's Stephanie Bice reaching out on behalf of my friend and fellow Congresswoman-elect Michelle Steel. Michelle and I are among the 13 conservative women who flipped House of Representatives' seats this year. After tough races in both California and Oklahoma this fall, our values won out, all thanks to you, Friend. Republican women like Michelle and I broke records this year, and I am hoping you will take just a moment to stand with us before we head to Washington to make a difference in the lives of Oklahomans, Californians, and all Americans. Michelle and I have never backed down from a challenge, and our commitment to preserving the American way of life enabled us to win back these key seats from Democrat incumbents. As an Oklahoma State Senator, I have a record of always putting my community first, and the policies I have supported made a positive difference in the lives of my Oklahoma constituents. Michelle brings that same level of commitment to the Golden State with a proven track record of finding bipartisan solutions for the issues facing Californians today. _Together, we are ready to fight for you in Congress._ [_**Friend, will you stand by Michelle Steel and me so we can make a difference for you and your family in Washington, D.C.?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QITjowjMBOCzz1GhXM4ZBgLelG6jpAnJl-OecgHn-7_Ud7Rka7ogJLumiDYpp-14GfiIvUOnoJQ5PxtAZeJnp-B9sAbe5VmhVHQN9CL-mwM9X26psiubNgSRQp1yJrbgUnyINJgX9050ioMH0JXrZDzqRbOQXMx_TSVDwo4o9uOJuSnEcf7mDlkFucgd1R55ZWgZQnhRlC4owL-E47kRFPNmHhg0E1XKJlRVElHsII3D4XoKGwqAqDnZ5yvCksIFGfOY-tGOIwslfS10gTrfuMpxrx2uks-IC8KlsAyRh293201ZI9FJES8zHnzGs3FQdoNkpj1kQqHlbtkAK26sw9hEN-AUAwN5tV1X70sdc51tUa6OIqCchZslTDnM7X7utTRMgM6eN-XQJRLwBEnUNAW97JrCwB2TtpyRbu6IDGlqDMuXAAtFn7tFPIohnWU5aNlZeyNHjm0=&c=a80uL4DxiO0jCOmcQmJKSK7yFzQPDSVoCJmfH-moYo18WdqkJZ4APQ==&ch=LoQxQPXJWsN4PsYQUjY1O1gQUeOnHHe2VFPj763wcUQVS5qqbs_7EQ==) Thank you for your support,

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: A Gift To You This Christmas
body:
| | Peter, A beautifully written story can stir emotions and paint vivid pictures of the people and events you are reading about. And that is exactly what our ministry partner and friend, author, and Pastor Robert Morgan, has done in creating a short fictional Christmas story each year—an original work he shares with his church on Christmas Eve. As we all take time to reflect on a year that has been like no other, we know, as Pastor Morgan says, “No matter what goes wrong in life or what disasters befall us, the birth of a little boy in a rustic stable on Christmas Day somehow makes everything turn out just right.” **As a[small gift to you](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zys61DwWquMjR52FQ8wBxPP4nXdMa1lMHLLBUOp4DB1w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201222com01&n=1), we’ve taken one of Pastor Morgan’s short stories entitled “That’s My Boy,” from his classic collection called _12 Stories of Christmas_ and made it available for you to download and enjoy. ** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zys61DwWquMjR52FQ8wBxPP4nXdMa1lMHLLBUOp4DB1w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201222com01&n=2) We hope this light-hearted story lifts your spirit, brings a smile, and reminds you of the power of community. Our team is incredibly thankful for each of you. We pray for God’s blessings over you as we celebrate the birth of our Savior, who is called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace (Isaiah 9:6). Merry Christmas! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201222com01&n=3) P.S. If you’d like to read the rest of the _12 Stories of Christmas_ by Robert Morgan, you can purchase the collection on Kindle or by audio [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=heodq3ohBAOIdlJZg-UqpA_AssdaYiuBRcWHTYc9k6dAY_xR-b9tbeMo-Uw6xwU7FWD2XDFlxgWrNzo08Bclw_-8wlOycMtWWvNwE9e50qs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201222com01&n=4).
---

subject: We need YOU, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
From cutting taxes to confirming conservative judges to our nation's courts, our Republican Senate Majority is delivering REAL results for the American people. name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Offers Legal Support to Georgia Counties That Stand Up to Left's Misinformation and Intimidation Campaign
body:
Last week we initiated an historic effort to challenge potentially ineligible voter registrations ahead of Election Day on Jan. 5.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3620)
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE OFFERS LEGAL SUPPORT TO GEORGIA COUNTIES THAT STAND UP TO LEFT'S MISINFORMATION AND INTIMIDATION CAMPAIGN

---
| | Friends -

As expected, the Left didn’t wait long to try and stop our efforts to ensure a free and fair election in the Georgia runoffs. As you all know, last week we initiated an historic effort to [challenge](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYW5zLWluLWV2ZXJ5LWNvdW50eS10by1wcmVlbXB0aXZlbHktY2hhbGxlbmdlLTM2NDU0MS1wb3RlbnRpYWxseS1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3622) potentially ineligible voter registrations ahead of Election Day on Jan. 5. Within 48 hours we learned that leftist election lawyer Marc Elias had issued his own [threat](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyLTE4LTIwMjAtTlZSQS1MZXR0ZXItR3dpbm5ldHQtQ291bnR5LnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3629) to Georgia’s Election Boards, misleading them to believe that the Elector Challenges are not legal and threatening legal action to any boards who move forward with the challenges.

Well, we at True the Vote know better. We will not be intimidated and we will not be silenced. That is why we are offering to support any legal action that Georgia Election Boards may have to take to defend their ability to follow the law. I want to share the [letter](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyMjEyMC1HQS1Db3VudHktZWxlY3Rpb24tYm9hcmQtbGV0dGVyLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3630) – included below – that we sent them this week along with a clear explanation of the legal grounds behind our Elector Challenge. In the short time that True the Vote has been on the ground in Georgia, the work hasn’t stopped. On top of our historic Elector [Challenge](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYW5zLWluLWV2ZXJ5LWNvdW50eS10by1wcmVlbXB0aXZlbHktY2hhbGxlbmdlLTM2NDU0MS1wb3RlbnRpYWxseS1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3622), we have successfully [partnered](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYS1nb3AtdG8tZW5zdXJlLXRyYW5zcGFyZW50LXNlY3VyZS1iYWxsb3QtZWZmb3J0LWZvci1zZW5hdGUtcnVub2ZmLWVsZWN0aW9ucyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3631) with the Georgia GOP on their election integrity and training efforts (we sought a similar partnership with the [Georgia Democratic Party](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyMjAyMC1HQS1EZW1vY3JhdC1QYXJ0eS1QYXJ0bmVyc2hpcC5wZGY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3632), but have yet to hear back).

Friends, the truth and the law are on our side. Thank you for being with us in this fight. Our work here in Georgia is only the beginning of our efforts nationwide to restore faith and confidence in our election system.

Onward,

\- The True the Vote Team

---
| |
> December 21, 2020
> VIA EMAIL
> To Georgia County Election Boards:
> Thank you for the ongoing work you’re doing toward our shared goal of carrying out the Senate runoff election in a way that complies with Georgia law and promotes faith in the outcome. Our organization, True the Vote, has worked in all 159 counties in the state to ensure that every legal vote counts and every illegal vote is discovered. Using databases including the U.S. Postal Service’s National Change of Address file, we have assisted Georgia citizens with voter challenges in cases where there is probable cause to believe that the person has moved out of the county where they are registered.
> We are aware that the ACLU and the Perkins-Coie law firm have provided several counties with misleading information about the voter challenges, and we want to correct the record, as well as assure that we will support the legal efforts of any county that follows Georgia law by reviewing the status of challenged voters. Attached is a [letter](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyMjEyMC1HQS1Db3VudHktZWxlY3Rpb24tYm9hcmQtbGV0dGVyLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3630) we requested from our General Counsel, Jim Bopp, with The Bopp Law Firm, to more fully detail the legal grounds support the elector challenges.
> As our attorneys confirm through this correspondence, the elector challenges apply solely to eligibility to vote in the Jan. 5 runoff election. This process will not result in any voters being removed from the rolls, and will not deny the right to vote of any legal voter. A challenged voter can vote a challenged ballot, with that vote counted once eligibility is confirmed.
> The challenges provided used the National Change of Address database, and were further refined through the use of other commercially available sources, to identify records that indicated a permanent change in residence. The challenges do demonstrate probable cause that a voter has moved away from the address at which they are registered to vote. Georgia hasn’t crosschecked its rolls with the National Change of Address database since 2019. Given estimates that 11 percent of Americans move every year, there’s high probability that many people are registered in Georgia at addresses where they no longer live. These elector challenges are a method provided for under Georgia to protect the integrity of the voter rolls.
> It’s prudent to carry out these challenges now. The failure of county election boards to comply with Georgia law and accept the challenges before them risks invalidating the runoff election, which would require another. We look forward to working with you to complete a successful election where every Georgian can have faith in the system and believe the outcome reflects the will of legal voters.
> For America -
> Catherine Engelbrecht True the Vote, Founder
> [Click here to read the full letter and attachment.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ3cC1jb250ZW50JTJGdXBsb2FkcyUyRjEyMjEyMC1HQS1Db3VudHktZWxlY3Rpb24tYm9hcmQtbGV0dGVyLnBkZg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=344A778A20A3630)
>
>

| Friends,

Today, our radical opponent, Rita Hart has filed a petition to Nancy Pelosi to overturn the election result in Iowa’s 2nd District.
---
| [Donate Now](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=0326b3b074&e=16fac31a0f "Donate Now")
---
| | | This election has been decided by Iowans, and that decision should not be thrown into Washington's hyper-partisan atmosphere.

We need your help. Rita Hart's actions will not only affect the outcome of this race. Her actions will define the integrity of Iowa's elections for generations to come.

If you want to help us fight back, we have put together a list of items that will help us in our ongoing battle to uphold the will of Iowa voters.

1.) [Chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help with our legal fees.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=bb4e7f76ec&e=16fac31a0f)
2.) [Sign-up to submit a letter to the editor.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=1fc55983dd&e=16fac31a0f)
3.) Contact members of the House Administration Committee and tell them that Iowan's voices will not be drowned out by Washington D.C. politicians!
a.) Jamie Raskin (D) MD: (202)-225-5341
b.) Zoe Lofgren (D) CA: (202)-225-3072
c.) Susan Davis (D) CA: (202)-225-2040
d.) GK Butterfield (D) NC: (202)-225-3101
e.) Marcia Fudge (D) OH: (202)-225-7032
f.) Pete Aguilar (D) CA: (202)-225-3201
4.) Share this email with your friends and family, and on social media.

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
Congresswoman-Elect

body:
There will be more Republican women in Congress than ever before in history! &zwnj
Friend, It was because of supporters like you across the country, **t****hat there will be more Republican women in Congress than ever before in history!** Ten of these women, including my friend Ashley Hinson from Iowa, managed to flip their districts from blue to RED! [_**Will you join me in supporting Ashley and the rest of the freshmen GOP Congresswomen heading to Washington?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYn0kDdnxxmC159jfqoQm2fYPpuNGc_Myi_E2JnyuIX6PbH-pjexjRBBM_q7hsicclTW8tii0f8dK-NUo5ftwhZt4e_Y-RvjQigaI4sTu0Smp7E7jduSroKNHD0fUinVldnisIJS5ziOPNCLcKKbkTpdMfBwNrjZfe9Dn55Z6crwEAMSanqVc2JGukJ4eR-nBnXi7QafJdeVyk-8woMzNg6LZ83ALbWfTFwZAZ9UR2ZJ3IpvZeXdThdaQD_7OXYGzLQbpfZu4-xVQD4y1zAlgVkoFfEKPQtCUBOchVXRpKi-X3bWMCKlL1ZFE9YMDQU3hsViXJLNzymzN_brbi8PwN-cxo9AYGF82UwDb7aBSB_JHf7K8p2jUz4CbJTq5NV-RTK7MmbOVI3ZOPFlR5gxvm-G14-GXV2GzAQbCUUjMTNpfFl8mTOmJ4lSNjX2CcW4riNBWOSBJ0t7Z5nOAmdi8dlqr3EQjiVgYA2rw2aKWdzHge-b0crH0f__Wtsow5Qn&c=0uqo8L1F843-3pn8H_f6Bm2auOUki3PTjPE4Z966G6YCFxmLXog3oQ==&ch=R5l1CPngTLqIU8o3jyDzPVo02nu8XpoePW23JMO6WjuPL8PhKIlB0w==) **[**Yes! Support conservative women!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYn0kDdnxxmC159jfqoQm2fYPpuNGc_Myi_E2JnyuIX6PbH-pjexjRBBM_q7hsicclTW8tii0f8dK-NUo5ftwhZt4e_Y-RvjQigaI4sTu0Smp7E7jduSroKNHD0fUinVldnisIJS5ziOPNCLcKKbkTpdMfBwNrjZfe9Dn55Z6crwEAMSanqVc2JGukJ4eR-nBnXi7QafJdeVyk-8woMzNg6LZ83ALbWfTFwZAZ9UR2ZJ3IpvZeXdThdaQD_7OXYGzLQbpfZu4-xVQD4y1zAlgVkoFfEKPQtCUBOchVXRpKi-X3bWMCKlL1ZFE9YMDQU3hsViXJLNzymzN_brbi8PwN-cxo9AYGF82UwDb7aBSB_JHf7K8p2jUz4CbJTq5NV-RTK7MmbOVI3ZOPFlR5gxvm-G14-GXV2GzAQbCUUjMTNpfFl8mTOmJ4lSNjX2CcW4riNBWOSBJ0t7Z5nOAmdi8dlqr3EQjiVgYA2rw2aKWdzHge-b0crH0f__Wtsow5Qn&c=0uqo8L1F843-3pn8H_f6Bm2auOUki3PTjPE4Z966G6YCFxmLXog3oQ==&ch=R5l1CPngTLqIU8o3jyDzPVo02nu8XpoePW23JMO6WjuPL8PhKIlB0w==)** I am so proud to be working alongside a record number of women who are committed to fighting for conservative values. Together, I know we will roll up our sleeves and get to work to fight the far-left's socialist agenda of the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and defunding the police. [_**Will you join me in celebrating the largest caucus of GOP women in history?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYn0kDdnxxmC159jfqoQm2fYPpuNGc_Myi_E2JnyuIX6PbH-pjexjRBBM_q7hsicclTW8tii0f8dK-NUo5ftwhZt4e_Y-RvjQigaI4sTu0Smp7E7jduSroKNHD0fUinVldnisIJS5ziOPNCLcKKbkTpdMfBwNrjZfe9Dn55Z6crwEAMSanqVc2JGukJ4eR-nBnXi7QafJdeVyk-8woMzNg6LZ83ALbWfTFwZAZ9UR2ZJ3IpvZeXdThdaQD_7OXYGzLQbpfZu4-xVQD4y1zAlgVkoFfEKPQtCUBOchVXRpKi-X3bWMCKlL1ZFE9YMDQU3hsViXJLNzymzN_brbi8PwN-cxo9AYGF82UwDb7aBSB_JHf7K8p2jUz4CbJTq5NV-RTK7MmbOVI3ZOPFlR5gxvm-G14-GXV2GzAQbCUUjMTNpfFl8mTOmJ4lSNjX2CcW4riNBWOSBJ0t7Z5nOAmdi8dlqr3EQjiVgYA2rw2aKWdzHge-b0crH0f__Wtsow5Qn&c=0uqo8L1F843-3pn8H_f6Bm2auOUki3PTjPE4Z966G6YCFxmLXog3oQ==&ch=R5l1CPngTLqIU8o3jyDzPVo02nu8XpoePW23JMO6WjuPL8PhKIlB0w==) I know I can count on Ashley and the rest of the female GOP caucus to fight for common sense solutions to get America back on track. Liberals have sat on their hands and played politics for far too long, delaying a crucial COVID-19 relief bill just so they could add their radical agenda items to it! I know I can count on Ashley and our fellow Congresswomen to join me in working on real policies that help all Americans -- [_**will you join clean_body: There will be more Republican women in Congress than ever before in history! &zwnj Friend, It was because of supporters like you across the country, that there will be more Republican women in Congress than ever before in history! Ten of these women, including my friend Ashley Hinson from Iowa, managed to flip their districts from blue to RED! == == I am so proud to be working alongside a record number of women who are committed to fighting for conservative values. Together, I know we will roll up our sleeves and get to work to fight the far-left's socialist agenda of the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and defunding the police. == I know I can count on Ashley and the rest of the female GOP caucus to fight for common sense solutions to get America back on track. Liberals have sat on their hands and played politics for far too long, delaying a crucial COVID-19 relief bill just so they could add their radical agenda items to it! I know I can count on Ashley and our fellow Congresswomen to join me in working on real policies that help all Americans -- == == == == == == Thank you, Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers == | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Happy Holidays,Peter✨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wGnr_IOxN3hXMtk7kKo3A7CA6VpbAi7dGpfnwn92UjE=/MdWLQlPsPNTFDfp6IVtB5gt9r4B2YOkgoJlQ3XQBIeA=)
The end of 2020 is finally in sight -- and, my, what a year it's been.
Marked by immeasurable loss, this year has tested us all. It has completely upended any sense of "normalcy," and shone a light on some of the most glaring inequities in our society.
While I'm glad to see 2020 go, I will carry lessons from this year with me for a _very_ long time. Lessons like _truly_ cherishing time spent in-person with friends and loved ones. _Enjoying_ life's small pleasures, like a walk around the neighborhood with my son and dogs. And, being so _grateful _that I get to advocate for my community every single day -- _especially_ in times like these.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wGnr_IOxN3hXMtk7kKo3A7CA6VpbAi7dGpfnwn92UjE=/sxzmdt28DtHmy0bJtksfdebYJczbCeaCRbCkrTPS85o=?refcode=X_122220_HappyHolidays)
Your holiday celebrations likely look much different this year than in the past. Not seeing friends and family is a sacrifice -- _particularly_ for folks who find themselves celebrating alone. However, by social distancing and practicing caution, we are helping preserve future holidays with our loved ones. We are _also_ protecting our communities from the further spread of coronavirus.
My hope is that by this time next year, we will each be surrounded by our loved ones, continuing the holiday traditions that we hold near and dear. For now, however, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a happy and healthy holiday season!
Wishing you the best,
_\-- Linda S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wGnr_IOxN3hXMtk7kKo3A7CA6VpbAi7dGpfnwn92UjE=/gPprQsa0VBHy1IvGHL90frEX7vgpyqGKcI3D-O89n4Y=?refcode=X_122220_HappyHolidays)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wGnr_IOxN3hXMtk7kKo3A7CA6VpbAi7dGpfnwn92UjE=/HJkLh586n1DiT7urYdJgi_OkRHjxwngn2bpFuXnKk5Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wGnr_IOxN3hXMtk7kKo3A7CA6VpbAi7dGpfnwn92UjE=/qdT4P1eAZ_4ywMPwAXhlAfof0vBLKRL6hnWo7gCHpfQ=)_ _

* * *

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Special Request
body:
Open this email to see how you can help Judicial Watch!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

I am very pleased that you follow Judicial Watch's work as we fight for the rule of law, and against public corruption and government secrecy.

[**And today I want to ask you to consider further committing yourself to our fight against government corruption by making your best year-end contribution to Judicial Watch today.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52377&L=21573&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/c291cmNlPTEyNi8mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIyMjIwMzEwOQ==)

* Uncovering the facts behind **Biden family** **influence peddling schemes** in Ukraine and China;

* Exposing the seditious **Deep State** conspiracy to bring down President Trump;

* Battling for accountability in the **Clinton email** scandal;

* Leading the courtroom challenges to **illegal alien** sanctuary policies and other failures to enforce **immigration law** across the country; and

Fighting in state and federal courts to protect the **integrity of our elections**.
These efforts represent just a small portion of our record number of investigations and lawsuits fighting public corruption and government secrecy.

[**Will you join our fight today by making your best year-end contribution?**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52377&L=21573&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/c291cmNlPTEyNi8mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIyMjIwMzEwOQ==) Please help Judicial Watch keep winning on behalf of the American people and the rule of law!

Thank you in advance for your support!

Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton
President
Judicial Watch
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52377&L=21573&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/c291cmNlPTEyNi8mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTIyMjIwMzEwOQ==)

| Folks,

We are just **TWO** **weeks** away from the most important election of our lifetime. _The future of America is at stake_ , and Democrats are doing everything they can to gain full control of Congress and fundamentally change the country. If we don’t vote, we hand them the keys to do just that. name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: Join DNC Chair, Tom Perez for two important sessions...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- This year we have done the hard work necessary to win an historic election in which our democracy was at stake. Your efforts played a critical role in this success! Now, DNC Chair Tom Perez would like to invite you to participate in two key sessions that will discuss important issues about this election and the future. Please see his personal invitation below to join us and mark your calendars. Happy Holidays! Yours in the Fight. Mũthoni
|
---
| | **Invitation from DNC Chair, Tom Perez** Hi There, Thank you for your relentless work to elect Democrats. As this year comes to a close, we want to take some time to look back on this past election, and to look to the future in two areas: First, we would like to invite you to join us on Thursday, January 7 from 2:00 - 4:00pm ET/ 11:00am - 1:00pm PT for a Democratic Data Debrief. This two-hour event will include former Governor and DNC Chair Howard Dean, and speakers from the Biden campaign, Priorities USA, Democratic state parties, and many more. Second, we want to look back on how our efforts to combat disinformation fared, and open a dialogue about how we might build upon that foundation for future years. Please join us on Friday, January 8 from 2:00 - 4:00pm ET / 11:00am - 1:00pm PT for a Democratic Counter Disinformation Debrief. Come hear from folks from the Biden campaign, EMILY’s List, and our in-house counter disinformation team. RSVP and more information to come in the new year. My best, Tom
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=41a6f64b58&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: We asked for this—and got it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Starting in January, America will have a national climate adviser.
| | "With the election of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, the map of possibility just got larger. Now it's time to turn campaign promises into climate progress with sound investments, commonsense standards, and policy solutions that help us to cut carbon pollution, create millions of good-paying jobs, protect people's health, and build a more just and equitable society."
– Gina McCarthy, 11/13/20
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit)
Friend,
When we were writing the Evergreen Action Plan more than a year ago, the creation of a White House climate office was one of the first recommendations we included.
Well, it's official: President-elect Biden has appointed Gina McCarthy, former EPA head and current president and CEO of the Natural Resources Defense Council, to serve as national climate adviser and lead a new White House Office of Domestic Climate Policy.
**[This is a victory for Evergreen—and it gives us a whole new route for making our vision for a clean energy future a reality. Sign our petition today to urge Gina McCarthy to lead the coordination of every federal agency in an all-out climate mobilization.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1355?t=3&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit)**
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1355?t=4&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit)
---
Joe Biden ran for president with a vision for bold climate action and won with more votes than any presidential candidate in history. His announcement of McCarthy as national climate adviser shows that he is serious about fulfilling that mandate.
McCarthy supports strong standards, investments, and environmental justice in climate policy. And she recently stressed that every department in the Biden administration must center climate action and clean energy. Sound familiar?
**Starting in January, America will have a national climate adviser—and she could hardly be more qualified.**
**[Add your name today to urge Gina McCarthy to drive an all-out government mobilization to defeat the climate crisis and build a just, inclusive clean energy economy.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1355?t=5&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit)**
Thanks,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1355?t=6&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=5376%2E53494%2El1ggit). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Make an appointment and get tested
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've asked a lot from Rhode Islanders over the last ten months. Today, I have one more ask: please sign up to get tested this week and next week. Getting tested is one of the simplest, most effective ways you can protect your household from COVID-19. And over the last month, we've made testing easier than ever. Everyone in Rhode Island can sign up for a free test at [portal.ri.gov.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KYPa87N8C0o-HWSVK3FT2eOn4leSW7cT7k2dyKBuJiM3OyKmaQVDuHOww2U2flgRyXwTrDlaLOfb9t0scIBHnf3R7jx6UT6T2CIMwG-pJp0FjJ8cddGtVqc9n85-NpasLNgXODuqyo=&c=RjArQAAOGJIgr59pOW0DMNzHzFhDnR9jTOwjakj1_deTkQncZPK7uw==&ch=RvEEH-xTvrwum-LcXgbSnOwOS1cgbBmRWoUyNTiJIwRrwv_-uPzuRQ==) It doesn't matter if you have symptoms or not, it doesn't matter if you're a student or teacher, it doesn't matter where you work or what community you live in - everyone can go to that one website, and every test scheduled through that site is free. We've added a lot of capacity, so there are many open slots every day--including same-day appointments at some sites.
In addition to getting tested before and after Christmas, please make sure that you are following [the latest health guidelines](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KYPa87N8C0o-HWSVK3FT2eOn4leSW7cT7k2dyKBuJiM3OyKmaQVDkO-dHdaKqPabhsThXYA04yj03BSCfhE-1MvdMA1cJaZIjM5jVmVCbC_JHMBppyoCzlTCedExqmbacI6wLQFGnCPhYgbj9tqXg==&c=RjArQAAOGJIgr59pOW0DMNzHzFhDnR9jTOwjakj1_deTkQncZPK7uw==&ch=RvEEH-xTvrwum-LcXgbSnOwOS1cgbBmRWoUyNTiJIwRrwv_-uPzuRQ==). The name of the game now is staying with your household. You can go to dinner, you can go shopping, you can go to the movie theater - but you need to do it with the people you live with, and you need to wear a mask.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KYPa87N8C0o-HWSVK3FT2eOn4leSW7cT7k2dyKBuJiM3OyKmaQVDuHOww2U2flgRyXwTrDlaLOfb9t0scIBHnf3R7jx6UT6T2CIMwG-pJp0FjJ8cddGtVqc9n85-NpasLNgXODuqyo=&c=RjArQAAOGJIgr59pOW0DMNzHzFhDnR9jTOwjakj1_deTkQncZPK7uw==&ch=RvEEH-xTvrwum-LcXgbSnOwOS1cgbBmRWoUyNTiJIwRrwv_-uPzuRQ==)
---
| Please get tested early and often and stay with your household. I know it's not easy, but these steps are necessary to stay ahead of the virus and keep it from spreading to our households.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_KYPa87N8C0o-HWSVK3FT2eOn4leSW7cT7k2dyKBuJiM3OyKmaQVDkO-dHdaKqPa_OeY1DGeeCUv7iQ1P0fFv6Um9yD07gZZTd3AVp-frtQqgH2yj5NN6wyTHhbQR8SIhtDC6dPj7folHHGdSvAqhQOT6u6uroQ3BuNAbEkv8mQv0sc_ydFJFkib-xJc1SHV8aLoOici4EO9YpZZXdebOEb01SMh9JWgrjX0WYN979rIgqiEnJeM9zpEXAsfpScjBZWJFjikNbC8MXiA2o6naMMruhgOAmHwRlqgGGRJsSSoMK52OQBSftRfabob-2AMDbl6vOxcyPM=&c=RjArQAAOGJIgr59pOW0DMNzHzFhDnR9jTOwjakj1_deTkQncZPK7uw==&ch=RvEEH-xTvrwum-LcXgbSnOwOS1cgbBmRWoUyNTiJIwRrwv_-uPzuRQ==).
---
|
